source.note: FULL/verifiable multi-app port; deterministic container grade

task.en: In eTaxi (the ride app open in Safari at http://localhost:3006), set up airport transport for a trip: (1) book a ride whose destination is AVP airport, and (2) book a return ride whose pickup is AVP airport. Then add two saved locations in eTaxi: one labeled 'Dundies Venue' and one labeled 'Scranton Improv Academy'.
